message:
fix(tui): refine message display in TUI messages screen

Improve message rendering and display logic in the TUI messages
screen for better readability and visual consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

     query: &str,

+    let results = rows_result.map_or_else(
+        |_| Vec::new(),
+        |rows| {
+            rows.into_iter()
+                .filter_map(|row| {
+                    let created_ts = row.get_named::<i64>("created_ts").ok()?;
+                    Some(MessageEntry {
+                        id: row.get_named::<i64>("id").ok()?,

+                        show_project,

     if !results.is_empty() {
         let total = results.len();
